instruction: Each big truck can hold ${5 {\textstyle\frac{3}{5}}}$ tons of sand, while each small truck can hold ${1 {\textstyle\frac{1}{4}}}$ tons of sand. A team of $10$ big trucks and $8$ small trucks will deliver sand to a work site. If each truck has a full load of sand, how many tons of sand in total will be delivered? Solution: In total, [ANS] tons of sand will be delivered.
